summary: Motivated high school senior with 2 years of customer service experience, strong communication skills, and proven leadership abilities. Currently working as a Team Member/Shift Lead Trainee at Main Street Smoothies & Café while maintaining a 3.6 GPA and actively volunteering in the community.

experience.title: Team Member / Shift Lead Trainee
highlights: Provide friendly, fast-paced service to an average of 100+ customers per shift, ensuring high satisfaction and repeat business
Accurately manage a cash drawer and process transactions using a POS system, maintaining a 100% balance record
Multi-task between food preparation, inventory restocking, and maintaining a sanitized workspace according to health safety standards
Entrusted to open the shop independently and assist in training 3 new hires on beverage preparation and customer service protocols
Demonstrated exceptional reliability by maintaining a perfect attendance record while balancing a full-time academic schedule

experience.title: Volunteer
highlights: Organize and sort 500+ lbs of donations monthly
Assist in distributing supplies to local families in need

experience.title: Peer Tutor - Math & History
highlights: Assist underclassmen with homework assignments and exam preparation
Tutor twice a week after school
